overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a hooded character running through a vast desert canyon environment. The character traverses from an open sandy valley toward massive rocky cliffs, then enters a narrow canyon passage between towering rock walls under bright clear skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert valley with massive cliff ahead

agents.ego_description: hooded character running steadily across the open desert sand toward the massive cliff face in the distance

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff wall dominating the horizon with layered sedimentary rock formations
sloping rocky terrain rising up on the left side of the valley
sloping rocky terrain rising up on the right side of the valley
sandy desert floor with rippled dune patterns

segments.scene_description: The character runs through a wide-open desert valley under a clear blue sky. A massive cliff face looms ahead in the distance while rocky slopes frame both sides of the sandy terrain. The environment is empty and serene, with natural sunlight casting sharp shadows across the dunes.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow desert canyon passage between vertical rock walls

events.description: character enters the narrow canyon passage between towering rock walls

agents.ego_description: running through the confined canyon space, navigating between the close rock walls on either side

entered.detail: vertical rock wall forming the left side of the narrow canyon passage
vertical rock wall forming the right side of the narrow canyon passage

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow enclosed canyon as the character runs between towering vertical rock walls. The sky becomes partially obscured by the canyon rims above. The ground shifts from smooth sand to rougher gravel terrain. The massive cliff face from the previous segment passes behind as the character delves deeper into the winding canyon passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character traverses a wide-open desert valley that gradually narrows into a towering canyon passage. It begins with the character running through a serene, sandy expanse under a clear blue sky, with a massive cliff face looming in the far distance. As the character advances, the open terrain shifts toward the rocky slopes, and the scene transitions into an enclosed canyon where vertical rock walls begin to obscure the sky. The ground then changes from smooth sand to rough gravel as the distant cliff face passes behind, finally leading the character deeper into the winding, shadowed depths of the canyon.
